Caption: Experimental setup of ultrasound pretreatment of mulberry leaves before drying. (1) ultrasound generator; (2) ultrasound transducer; (3) ultrasound cylinder probe; (4) thermostatic water bath; (5) impeller; (6) 100-mL glass beaker.
3D plots about effects of AED and ultrasound duration during ultrasound pretreatment on weight gain (a), solid loss (b), D e (c) and h m (d) of mulberry leaves.
Experimental and modeled drying kinetics of mulberry leaves carried out at 60°C and 2.5m/s.
